summary: Freelance developer working alongside university studies, delivering frontend-focused solutions with occasional full-stack responsibilities for small businesses and individuals.

duties.title: Frontend Development
duties.description: Designing and building responsive, user-friendly interfaces based on client requirements and business needs.

duties.title: Backend & Integration
duties.description: Developing lightweight backend services and integrating frontend applications with APIs and databases.

duties.title: Client Collaboration & Delivery
duties.description: Working directly with clients to gather requirements, propose solutions, iterate on feedback, and deliver projects on time.

achievements.title: End-to-End Freelance Projects
achievements.description: Delivered multiple freelance projects from initial concept to deployment while managing both technical and client-facing responsibilities.
achievements.impact: Built strong autonomy, communication skills, and the ability to translate business needs into functional software.

achievements.title: Frontend Performance & UX Improvements
achievements.description: Improved UI responsiveness and user experience through component optimization and better state management.
achievements.impact: Increased client satisfaction and usability across delivered applications.

achievements.title: Balancing Freelancing with University Studies
achievements.description: Successfully managed freelance workloads in parallel with academic commitments.
achievements.impact: Developed strong time management, prioritization, and self-discipline skills.

systems.name: Client Web Applications
systems.description: Small to medium web applications built for individual clients and small businesses.
